text.title: Trivy Pinned Supply-Chain Scan Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to wire Trivy + SBOM end-to-end.

step.name: confirm-surface
step.action: Confirm repo produces container image, IaC artefact, or release tarball.
step.decision-gate: If docs-only or air-gapped without offline DB, STOP.

step.name: select-pinned-sha
step.action: Pick a known-clean release; record full 40-char SHA. Confirm SHA is NOT in compromised-tag blocklist.

step.name: commit-workflow
step.action: Commit `trivy.yml` with `trivy fs` + `trivy image` jobs; fail-on=HIGH,CRITICAL + misconfig; action pinned by SHA; binary pinned by version.

step.name: wire-sbom-release
step.action: Add `release-sbom.sh` step that runs `trivy fs --format cyclonedx --output sbom.cdx.json .` and `gh release upload --clobber $TAG sbom.cdx.json`.
